item.name: Atlassian Get Inline Tasks Based On Search Parameters

query.description: The starting offset for the results.
The number of results to be returned.
The space key of a space. Multiple space keys can be specified.
The page id of a page. Multiple page ids can be specified.
Account ID of a user to whom a task is assigned. Multiple users can be specified.
Account ID of a user to who created a task. Multiple users can be specified.
Account ID of a user who completed a task. Multiple users can be specified.
Start of date range based on due dates (inclusive).
End of date range based on due dates (inclusive).
Start of date range based on create dates (inclusive).
End of date range based on create dates (inclusive).
Start of date range based on complete dates (inclusive).
End of date range based on complete dates (inclusive).
The status of the task. (checked/unchecked)

request.description:
Deprecated, use [Confluence's v2 API](https://developer.atlassian.com/cloud/confluence/rest/v2/intro/).

Returns inline tasks based on the search query.

**[Permissions](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/_AozKw) required**:
Permission to access the Confluence site ('Can use' global permission). Only tasks
in contents that the user has permission to view are returned.

response.name: Returned if the query fetches zero or more results.

query.description: The starting offset for the results.
The number of results to be returned.
The space key of a space. Multiple space keys can be specified.
The page id of a page. Multiple page ids can be specified.
Account ID of a user to whom a task is assigned. Multiple users can be specified.
Account ID of a user to who created a task. Multiple users can be specified.
Account ID of a user who completed a task. Multiple users can be specified.
Start of date range based on due dates (inclusive).
End of date range based on due dates (inclusive).
Start of date range based on create dates (inclusive).
End of date range based on create dates (inclusive).
Start of date range based on complete dates (inclusive).
End of date range based on complete dates (inclusive).
The status of the task. (checked/unchecked)

response.body:
{
  "limit": "<integer>",
  "results": [
    {
      "contentId": "<long>",
      "createDate": "<long>",
      "creator": "<string>",
      "globalId": "<long>",
      "id": "<long>",
      "status": "<string>",
      "title": "<string>",
      "description": "<string>",
      "body": "<string>",
      "assignee": "<string>",
      "completeUser": "<string>",
      "dueDate": "<long>",
      "updateDate": "<long>",
      "completeDate": "<long>",
      "_links": {
        "value": "reference #/components/schemas/GenericLinks not found in the OpenAPI spec"
      }
    },
    {
      "contentId": "<long>",
      "createDate": "<long>",
      "creator": "<string>",
      "globalId": "<long>",
      "id": "<long>",
      "status": "<string>",
      "title": "<string>",
      "description": "<string>",
      "body": "<string>",
      "assignee": "<string>",
      "completeUser": "<string>",
      "dueDate": "<long>",
      "updateDate": "<long>",
      "completeDate": "<long>",
      "_links": {
        "value": "reference #/components/schemas/GenericLinks not found in the OpenAPI spec"
      }
    }
  ],
  "size": "<integer>",
  "start": "<integer>"
}

response.name:
Returned if the calling user does not have permission to view
any content.

query.description: The starting offset for the results.
The number of results to be returned.
The space key of a space. Multiple space keys can be specified.
The page id of a page. Multiple page ids can be specified.
Account ID of a user to whom a task is assigned. Multiple users can be specified.
Account ID of a user to who created a task. Multiple users can be specified.
Account ID of a user who completed a task. Multiple users can be specified.
Start of date range based on due dates (inclusive).
End of date range based on due dates (inclusive).
Start of date range based on create dates (inclusive).
End of date range based on create dates (inclusive).
Start of date range based on complete dates (inclusive).
End of date range based on complete dates (inclusive).
The status of the task. (checked/unchecked)

item.name: Atlassian Get Inline Task Based On Global Id

variable.description: (Required) Global ID of the inline task

request.description:
Deprecated, use [Confluence's v2 API](https://developer.atlassian.com/cloud/confluence/rest/v2/intro/).

Returns inline task based on the global ID.

**[Permissions](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/_AozKw) required**:
Permission to view the content associated with the task.

response.name: Returned if the inline task was found given the global ID
response.body:
{
  "contentId": "<long>",
  "createDate": "<long>",
  "creator": "<string>",
  "globalId": "<long>",
  "id": "<long>",
  "status": "<string>",
  "title": "<string>",
  "description": "<string>",
  "body": "<string>",
  "assignee": "<string>",
  "completeUser": "<string>",
  "dueDate": "<long>",
  "updateDate": "<long>",
  "completeDate": "<long>",
  "_links": {
    "value": "reference #/components/schemas/GenericLinks not found in the OpenAPI spec"
  }
}

response.name: Returned if the authentication credentials are incorrect or missing from the request.
Returned if the user does not have permission to view the content associated with the task.
Returned if task could not be found with the given global ID.

item.name: Atlassian Update Inline Task Given Global Id

variable.description: (Required) Global ID of the inline task to update

request.description:
Updates an inline tasks status given its global ID

**[Permissions](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/_AozKw) required**:
Permission to update the content associated with the task.

response.name: Returned if the inline task was successfully updated.
response.body:
{
  "contentId": "<long>",
  "createDate": "<long>",
  "creator": "<string>",
  "globalId": "<long>",
  "id": "<long>",
  "status": "<string>",
  "title": "<string>",
  "description": "<string>",
  "body": "<string>",
  "assignee": "<string>",
  "completeUser": "<string>",
  "dueDate": "<long>",
  "updateDate": "<long>",
  "completeDate": "<long>",
  "_links": {
    "value": "reference #/components/schemas/GenericLinks not found in the OpenAPI spec"
  }
}

response.name: Returned if client input is invalid.
Returned if the authentication credentials are incorrect or missing from the request.
Returned if the user does not have permission to update the content associated with the task.
Returned if task could not be found with given global ID.
